features: Fun and Colourful Designs: Bright and playful designs make wearing plasters fun for kids, encouraging them to embrace wound care.
Gentle on Skin: Designed with children's delicate skin in mind, these plasters offer gentle adhesion to minimize discomfort and irritation.
Highly Absorbent Pad: Features a non-stick, highly absorbent pad that cushions wounds and absorbs exudate, promoting faster healing.
Flexible and Comfortable: Made from soft and flexible material that moves with your child's skin, ensuring comfort during playtime.
Hypoallergenic: Free from common allergens, these plasters are suitable for sensitive skin, providing worry-free protection for your little ones.
description: Product Description Introducing Proplast Children's Plasters, designed to turn boo-boos into smiles. With their vibrant and playful designs, these plasters make wound care fun for kids. Gentle on delicate skin, they offer comfort and protection without causing irritation. Each plaster features a highly absorbent pad that cushions wounds and promotes faster healing. Made from soft and flexible material, these plasters move with your child's skin, ensuring comfort during playtime. Hypoallergenic and safe for sensitive skin, Proplast Children's Plasters provide worry-free protection for your little ones' everyday adventures. Directions Clean the wound, apply the plaster, and secure it in place. Ensure the plaster is flexible enough to move with the skin and has a strong adhesive backing to stay in place. The non-stick gauze pad allows for easy removal without causing further discomfort to the wound.
